##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Benjamin N. Schumer
##DESCRIPTION=Dark or reddish brown prismatic crystals, associated with grey bladed eosphorite, colorless or white prismatic palermoite (R120141), and natropalermoite (130092).
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140539
